feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: OData V4 Error.
entry.content:
Hello SAPians,

I have a requirement where I'm making OData V4 POST call to S4HANA with standard OData api_safetydatasheetassessment. Now there is an extension to this API i.e SAP__self.UpdateSafetyDataSheetDocumentDetails which I'm providing manually because not getting this in Select Entity & Define Operations (attaching SS).

 

When I'm deploying the interface, I'm getting below error.

If anyone has worked on Product Compliance interfaces, please help me on this.

Please suggest some solution for this.


P.S : Already tried converting JSON to XML.
Also tried with HTTP adapter.  

 

Thanks in advance!! 😊

 


SAP Cloud Platform, industry edition, client libraries   SAP BTP, ABAP environment   SAP Integration Suite   Cloud Integration   SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: SBPA: Integrate different projects in visibility dashboard
entry.content:
Dear community, 

Let me first describe some context: 

  • I have 5 projects which all have one or multiple business processes. 
  • A launchpad is set up to start the business processes and see tasks in the Inbox App

My question now is:
How to set up and configure a visibility scenario dashboard without doing so for each project individually? 
Why do I want this?
I'd like to avoid to configure and maintain

  1. a visibility scenario per project
  2. multiple tiles for each visibility scenario dashboard in the launchpad.

My thoughts were to create a new project exclusively for this visibility scenario, where I import the said projects as an dependency. Unfortunately, I get the error stating: "The operation could not be performed due to missing permission.". 

Could somebody share their thoughts on this?
Why do I get the error "Acces denied"? And if there exists a workaround to integrate all business processes in one (1) dashboard.

Looking forward to your feedback. 
C.

entry.title: Connectivity Proxy Upgrade to 2.13.0
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have an issue while i'm trying to upgrade my connectivity proxy to version 2.13.0. This is what i get from the logs before it reaches ERROR state:

Starting Connectivity Proxy *                                                                                                                                                                            │
│ connectivity-proxy **************************************************************                                                                                                                                                                            │
│ connectivity-proxy 2025-02-28 09:17:40.308                      main             INFO K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter:110 - Validated system property connectivity_proxy.tunnel.server.host=test.com                                  │
│ connectivity-proxy 2025-02-28 09:17:40.310                      main             INFO K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter:110 - Validated system property connectivity_proxy.tunnel.server.port=443                                                                 │
│ connectivity-proxy 2025-02-28 09:17:40.310                      main             INFO K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter:110 - Validated system property connectivity.agent.version=2.518.0                                                                        │
│ connectivity-proxy 2025-02-28 09:17:40.310                      main             INFO K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter:110 - Validated system property connectivity_proxy.image.version=2.13.0                                                                   │
│ connectivity-proxy Exception in thread "main" java.lang.IllegalStateException: Missing or empty mandatory system property with key: connectivity_proxy.region_configurations.file                                                                            │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.spi.environment.SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.getMandatoryProperty(SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.java:103)                                                                                                 │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.spi.environment.SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.assertEnvironment(SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.java:79)                                                                                                     │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.spi.environment.SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.java:31)                                                                                                                │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.server.proxy.ConnectivityAgentEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(ConnectivityAgentEnvironmentInterpreter.java:16)                                                                                      │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.environment.AbstractK8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(AbstractK8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.java:52)                                                                                     │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.environment.K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.java:131)                                                                                                    │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.environment.K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.java:126)                                                                                                    │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.environment.K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.java:122)                                                                                                    │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.K8sScpConnectivityAgent.<init>(K8sScpConnectivityAgent.java:67)                                                                                                                           │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.K8sScpConnectivityAgent.<init>(K8sScpConnectivityAgent.java:6

entry.title: Is there a way to get ABAP Usage data like SCMON for BTP ABAP Environment?
entry.content:
For on-premise system we use SCMON / UPL to log the usage of ABAP code. This helps in analysing the code for migration or decommissioning.

Is there any way to get similar usage data for SAP BTP, ABAP environment in the same system or via Cloud ALM?

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Workzone - is it possible to merge content from different channels?
entry.content:
Hello,

I don't think this is possible but maybe I missed something on the documentation. Say you have a workzone instance (standard) with multiple channels configured (e.g. S/4 HANA and business solutions), and they contribute pages with the same names. Is it possible to merge them instead of having a duplication of tabs with the same name ?

 

Thanks in advance

 

@Vera_Gutbrod @ThomasReiss

entry.title: Media content field value disappeared after draftActivate
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I created an entity with media and draft feature activated. 

entity Files : cuid, managed {
    category    : String;
    fileName    : String;
    size        : String;

    
    mediaType   : String @Core.IsMediaType;
    isGenerated : Boolean;

    @Core.MediaType  : mediaType  @Core.ContentDisposition.Filename: fileName
    fileContent : LargeBinary;
    knowledges  : Composition of many Knowledges
                      on knowledges.file = $self;
}
    @odata.draft.enabled
    entity Files            as projection on ai.Files


The problem is Media content field "fileContent" value disappeared after draftActivate action , is there a bug in SAP CAP?
before draftActivateafter draftActivate

entry.title: Inquiry on SAP Solution for e-Invoicing Compliance in Europe (Including Hungary)
entry.content:
Dear,
 
We are currently looking for a technical solution to comply with various e-invoicing regulations across Europe, including Hungary’s NAV Online Számla. Our company is using SAP S/4HANA and BTP services(Integration Suite, CF Runtime, HANA Cloud..etc), and we need to ensure seamless integration between our ERP system and different tax authorities across the EU.
 
Could you please provide guidance on:
1. The recommended SAP solution for e-invoicing compliance in Europe (e.g., SAP Document Compliance, SAP Integration Suite, or API-based integration).
2. Standard SAP APIs available for submitting e-invoices to different tax authorities (e.g., NAV Online Számla in Hungary, SDI in Italy, Chorus Pro in France, etc.).
3. Required configurations in SAP S/4HANA to generate e-invoices compliant with EU standards (e.g., XRechnung, ZUGFeRD, Peppol).
4. Relevant SAP Notes, documentation, or best practices for multi-country e-invoicing implementation.
 
Looking forward to your response.
 
Best Regards

entry.title: ToolbarItem color not changing even after applying style in SAP MDK 24.11.2-002
entry.content:
In the previous version the below style was working as expected. With new version the toolbarItem color is not changing.
 
in Styles 
#BulkApproveToolbarItem {
color: #188918;
}

"ToolBar": {
"Items": [
{
"_Type": "Control.Type.ToolbarItem",
"_Name": "BulkApproveToolbarItem",
"Caption": "BulkApprove",
"Enabled": true,
"Clickable": true,
"Visible": true
}
]
}

Please guide to resolve this issue.

entry.title: SAP Business Rules - BTP service is deprecated
entry.content:
Hello,
We have been dealing with the fact that the constant changes in services on SAP BTP are a significant problem for our customers and our projects.

Now it has happened that the SAP Business Rules service has been marked as Deprecated without any information about what its successor is, or how we can adequately address a replacement in another way.

@SAPBTPDev @sapbtp Could you please advise us on where and how we can find information regarding this unexpected activity (decision)? I would expect some OSS note, but nothing is mentioned anywhere. The service simply disappeared from the Discovery Center - I would expect all information there, including the General OSS Note and instructions for the next steps.

Thank you,
Jiri

entry.title: Error 407 When Connecting SAP CAP to ECC via On-Premise Destination Only in Production Subaccount
entry.content:
I am facing a 407 Proxy Authentication Required error when connecting my SAP CAP application to ECC via an On-Premise Destination in SAP BTP. Strangely, this issue occurs only in the production subaccount, while the connection works fine in dev, QAS, and pre-production subaccounts.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Any suggestions on how to troubleshoot or resolve it?

attachment

entry.title: How do i trigger process automation(BPA) through custom ui5 application?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 
I am searching for "trigger build process automation using Custom ui5 application", i think we have to create destination to trigger it but i don't know the actual process.
please come up with suitable solution.
#BPA #Ui5 #automation #BTP #Fiori #SAP

Best regards
Kushagra Sharma

entry.title: How to add REST API Data Entity inside Build Apps from Service Cloud V2?
entry.content:
Hello together,
Being very new to SAP world and Build Apps, I am not able to fetch the entities of SCV2. The use case to fetch "location" data inside Build Apps from SCV2 using Basic Authentication method. Works very well in Postman. https://api.sap.com/api/SalesSvcCloudV2_functionalLocation/overview

Created destination with steps mentioned here. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/sap-systems#adding-a-btp-destination-prerequisites


Destination additional properties:

Destination was added under integration tab.

After many trial and error, I still get following error message and cannot list expected data inside Build Apps.


After "Run Test", I got following response, but no expected response again.

What wrong I am doing?

Can anyone support please? Thanks.

@Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: How to Run an ABAP Cloud Destination Locally in a SAP CAP Project?
entry.content:
Aqui está o post atualizado em inglês:

How to Run an ABAP Cloud Destination Locally in a SAP CAP Project?

Context

I am working on a SAP CAP project with a hybrid configuration, and I need to connect to an ABAP Cloud destination locally. The destination is properly configured, and I can reach it using curl.

Destination Configuration (package.json - hybrid profile)

Sensitive details are replaced with ***:

{
  "requires": {
    "[hybrid]": {
      "auth": {
        "binding": {
          "type": "cf",
          "apiEndpoint": "https://api.cf.***.hana.ondemand.com",
          "org": "***",
          "space": "dev",
          "instance": "teste-auth",
          "key": "teste-auth-key",
          "resolved": false
        },
        "kind": "xsuaa-auth",
        "vcap": {
          "name": "auth"
        }
      },
      "destinations": {
        "binding": {
          "type": "cf",
          "apiEndpoint": "https://api.cf.***.hana.ondemand.com",
          "org": "***",
          "space": "dev",
          "instance": "teste-destination",
          "key": "teste-destination-key",
          "resolved": false
        },
        "kind": "destinations",
        "vcap": {
          "name": "destinations"
        }
      },
      "connectivity": {
        "binding": {
          "type": "cf",
          "apiEndpoint": "https://api.cf.***.hana.ondemand.com",
          "org": "***",
          "space": "dev",
          "instance": "teste-connectivity",
          "key": "teste-connectivity-key",
          "resolved": false
        },
        "kind": "connectivity",
        "vcap": {
          "name": "connectivity"
        }
      },
      "API_PESSOAS": {
        "credentials": {
          "destination": "abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-***",
          "forwardAuthToken": false
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

curl Test

When running the following command:

curl -v abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-***.dest

I get a successful response (HTTP 200), confirming that the destination is reachable:

{"@odata.context":"$metadata","value":[{"name":"ZC_PESSOAS","url":"ZC_PESSOAS"}]}

Issue with cds watch --profile hybrid

However, when I try to run cds watch --profile hybrid to connect from CAP to the ABAP Cloud destination, I receive the following error:

Error during request to remote service: Failed to load destination. 
Caused by: No user token (JWT) has been provided. 
This is strictly necessary for 'OAuth2UserTokenExchange'.

External Service Connection Code

This is how I am executing the external connection:

try {
  const ExternalPessoas = await cds.connect.to('API_PESSOAS');
  return await ExternalPessoas.run(req.query);
} catch (error) {
  LOG.error(error);
}

Works Fine in Deployed Version

When deployed to SAP BTP, the destination works correctly, and I receive the expected response:

{
  "@odata.context": "$metadata#Pessoas",
  "@odata.metadataEtag": "W/\"20250311171855\"",
  "value": [
    {
      "Cpf": "12345678911",
      "Nome": "Fabricio",
      "Idade": 29,
      "SAP__Messages": []
    }
  ]
}

Question

  • How can I correctly authenticate and run this ABAP Cloud destination locally in my SAP CAP project using the hybrid profile?
  • Is there a way to pass the necessary JWT token in local development?
  • Do I need to configure something extra in my XSUAA or connectivity settings to make it work?

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated! 🚀

entry.title: CDS Debug Remote Application - Issue in SAP BAS - "Failed to open DevTools"
entry.content:
Title:
CDS Debug Issue in SAP BAS - "Failed to open DevTools"

Question:
I am trying to debug my <nome_srv> service in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) using the command:

cds debug teste-srv

However, I get the following error:

Failed to open DevTools: Command failed: google-chrome 'devtools://devtools/bundled/inspector.html?ws=localhost:9229/...'
/bin/sh: 1: google-chrome: not found
/bin/sh: 1: chromium-browser: not found
/bin/sh: 1: chromium: not found

Debugging works fine in my local VS Code environment. Also, using the old method in BAS works, but without Chrome:

cf ssh <app> -c "kill -usr1 `pidof node`"
cf ssh -N -L 9229:localhost:9229 <app>

The issue occurs specifically when using the command:

cds debug <service>

Do I need any additional configuration in BAS to make DevTools open properly?

I followed the official documentation here:
https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/tools/cds-cli#node-js-applications

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to Implement Load Balancing in SAP CAP Node.js on BTP?
entry.content: What are the steps to implement load balancing for a Node.js application using SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) on SAP BTP to ensure high availability and avoid service downtime during high traffic flows, so that no service becomes unavailable or overloaded?

entry.title: Optimizing SAP On-Premises to Azure SQL Server Data Pipeline for Scalability
entry.content:
I have configured a data pipeline to facilitate real-time or near-real-time data transfer between an SAP on-premises server and Azure SQL Server.

Current Setup:
Established a VPN connection to securely access the SAP on-premises database, enabling authentication-based access.
Implemented an ELT pipeline to load data into Azure SQL Server efficiently.
Additionally, configured an OData connection to extract and transfer data.
Currently, the setup functions well. However, I am concerned about its scalability as data traffic increases in the future. To ensure seamless performance, I am looking for ways to optimize the existing process.

I would appreciate insights, recommendations, and discussions on improving this setup for better efficiency and handling higher data volumes. Open to exploring alternative connectivity and data transfer approaches.

Looking forward to expert suggestions from the SAP Community!

Regards;
Prashant Marathe

entry.title: 403 forbidden error for XSUAA protected capm destination, the role restricted entity.
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I want to restrict an enitity in cds with READ only for a specific role, but getting 403 error.
My cap application is xsuaa enabled and configured as OAuth2UserTokenExchange destination in cf and my ui5 app is consuming that destination. and All the roles and role collection configured correctly

Below are configurations I made in my app
package.json

xs-security.json

{
  "xsappname": "capm_backend",
  "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
  "scopes": [
    {
      "name": "$XSAPPNAME.Viewer",
      "description": "Viewer role"
    }
  ],
  "attributes": [],
  "role-templates": [
    {
      "name": "VIEWER_ROLE",
      "description": "Viewer role",
      "scope-references": [
        "$XSAPPNAME.Viewer"
      ],
      "attribute-references": []
    }
  ],
  "authorities": [
    "$ACCEPT_GRANTED_AUTHORITIES"
  ],
  "oauth2-configuration": {
    "token-validity": 43200,
    "redirect-uris": [
      "https://applicationstudio.cloud.sap",
      "https://*.hana.ondemand.com/login/callback",
      "https://*.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/login/callback"
    ],
    "refresh-token-validity": 3600
  },
  "xsenableasyncservice": "true"
}

service.cds

service BookServices @(requires: 'authenticated-user') {

    entity BookData @(restrict: [{
        grant: ['READ'],
        to   : 'VIEWER_ROLE'
    }])                                      as projection on book.BookData;
}

I am trying to access the BookData end point from my ui5 app it's returning 403 error

entry.title: S/4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD Monitor Email Transmissions
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working on sending emails in the demo development system via ABAP development. Even if I send mail successfully with 'Sent' status, I cannot view its attachments and body text in "Monitor Email Transmissions" Application just as in the attached screenshot.

Is there any other way to ensure I send mail with correct body and attachments?

entry.title: Unable to subsribe integration suite getting error subscription failed with error code 400
Call Action Project error queryA ENOTFOUND in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Destination configuration 

we configured the S4HANA On-premise URL as a Destination like in a below screenshot.

Action Project

Process Automation Flow

We added the above Action project as a Dependency to our process automation flow like in a below screenshot.

Problem we are facing

Below is the response of the action activity 'GET_MAIL_LIST'.

I saw the similar issue in the below community link : Call web service error queryA ENOTFOUND - SAP Community However it didn't help us to resolve the issue.

Kindly help me to figure out the issue.

SAP Business Technology Platform, SAP Build Process Automation 

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Sakthi.
